name: leo-agaile-builder
description: Agile-inspired multi-agent sprint harness for Codex and Claude Code.

interface.shortDescription: Run PRD, design, implementation, review, and retro sprint loops.
interface.longDescription: A tool-neutral Agile workflow harness with role-scoped agent prompts, sprint artifacts, DDD rules, file annotations, and sliding-window project memory.
defaultPrompt: Run a sprint for: add a hello-world CLI command
Plan the current sprint using the agile harness
Review the current sprint and write 04-review.md
